title: Inst. Muhammed İBRAHİMOĞLU
content:
Inst. Muhammed İBRAHİMOĞLU

Undergraduate

Resume

YÖK Akademik

Full Time

Resume

Lect. Muhammed İbrahimoglu completed his undergraduate studies in the Department of Arabic Language and Literature at the University of Aleppo. He earned his Master’s degree from the Department of Arabic Language and Culture at Mardin Artuklu University.

Between 2015 and 2018, İbrahimoglu took part in academic projects involving manuscript verification, investigation, and research at the Anadolu and Haliç Research Center. Since 2018, he has been serving as a Lecturer in the Arabic Preparatory Program at the School of Foreign Languages, Istanbul 29 Mayıs University. Additionally, he contributes to the International Arabic Center for Education Implementation and Research (ARÖMER) within the same institution.

İbrahimoglu’s professional expertise focuses on Arabic Literature, with a particular specialization in Arabic Poetry. His contributions to the field of Teaching Arabic as a Foreign Language (TAFL) include the authorship of the work “Literary Texts for Learners of Arabic,” developed in accordance with contemporary pedagogical methodologies.
